title: Status Change Automation and People Column Selection Options
excerpt:
Hello monday.com Community, 
I am currently using the “When a status changes to something, assign someone as assignee” automation and would like to use a person/team set from another user column on that board.  However, …

posts.author: andrew.shatz (Andrew Shatz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday.com Community,

I am currently using the “When a status changes to something, assign someone as assignee” automation and would like to use a person/team set from another user column on that board. However, this automation only allows user selection from the master account/access list.

I know that there are other automations that allow for user/team selection from existing person, team, or people columns on the board. I believe that this automation will reap the full benefits of such an addition.

Thank you for your time,

Andrew

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 from me. The same for column permissions. It would be nice if you can select a person/team selected in another column for automatons and permissions.

posts.author: Lucas1 (Lucas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, I think my feature request could also be helpful for this? Maybe drop me a vote as well if you agree:
Automation: Assign whoever is in this column to that column - Feature requests - monday Community Forum
